  "claims": [
    "SB 740 extends the skilled and trained workforce requirements applied to petroleum refineries to emerging green industries including hydrogen manufacturing, biofuels manufacturing, and carbon dioxide capture.",
    "A skilled and trained workforce ensures that workers are performing work in apprenticeable occupations.",
    "The shift to a skilled and trained workforce in California’s refineries did not result in worker shortages or disruptions.",
    "Many California refineries chose to enter into direct project labor agreements with the Building Trades after the shift to a skilled and trained workforce.",
